(Translated by Google)

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzb2ZudkhREAE

reviews.comment:
La zona está un poco dejada y con poca iluminación, sobretodo de noche. Se quedaron sin combustible en fecha pico pero no te ponen un cartel de nada, solo la cierran hasta que les traigan. Se forman filas de autos en ambos extremos de la estación pero no les indican a los conductores de que lado quedarse.

(Translated by Google)
The area is a bit run-down and poorly lit, especially at night. They ran out of fuel during peak hours, but there's no sign; they just close until they get more. Lines of cars form at both ends of the station, but they don't tell drivers which side to wait on.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzb3ViNnpnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hace 20 años q está igual, no mejoran ni la entrada ni la salida, a nadie le interesa, solo quieren el dinero

(Translated by Google)
It's been the same for 20 years, they haven't improved either the entrance or the exit, nobody cares, they just want the money
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzbnNIaGJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención lugar limpio lo único malo que al ser la única y con pocos surtidores en temporada se forman largas filas

(Translated by Google)
Good service, clean place. The only downside is that, being the only station with few pumps, long lines form during peak season.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzOW9mZm1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente siempre hay cola para cargar nafta! Sea el día que sea!!

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, there's always a line to get gas! No matter the day!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzMXUteUNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Es peligroso, llegar, siempre toca hacer fila y pasan los autos, camiones y colectivos de larga distancia por la ruta  pegados... La salida un desastre todo el piso roto, peligroso para incorporarse a la ruta y volver... Hay mucho que mejorar!

(Translated by Google)
It's dangerous to get there; you always have to wait in line, and cars, trucks, and long-distance buses pass you by on the road, practically glued together. The exit is a disaster; the whole road is broken, making it dangerous to merge onto the highway and return. There's a lot of room for improvement!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzbHZPWTd3RRAB
